allow: PowerShell($e = [char]27; [Console]::Write\("$e]0;SIDISVA - test titlu$\([char]7\)"\); "title set to: 'SIDISVA - test titlu'")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path .claude -Force -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-30\) } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object @{N='Path';E={$_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\',''\)}}, @{N='Modified';E={$_.LastWriteTime.ToString\('HH:mm:ss'\)}}, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,2\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
